sections.paragraph:
Original: חוּשׁי

Transliteration: chûshay

Phonetic: khoo-shah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Hushai = "hasting"
  1. an Archite, a friend of David
  2. the father of Baana, an officer of Solomon; probably the same as 1

Origin: from H2363

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
